issue_description: The greeting output format is wrong. Fix it so greet("world") returns "Hello, world!" and greet("Alice") returns "Hello, Alice!".
Add input validation for discount_percent. Values below 0 or above 100 must raise ValueError, and the error message should mention discount_percent.
Fix the clamp boundary logic so values exactly on the max boundary and above the max boundary both return max_value.
Fix slugify normalization. It should trim outer whitespace, collapse repeated spaces, lowercase the text, and join words with single hyphens.
Fix parse_bool so it accepts common boolean string forms like true/false, 1/0, yes/no, and raises ValueError for unknown inputs.
Fix the state leak caused by a mutable default argument. Each call should behave independently unless an explicit list is passed in.
Fix write_report so it creates missing parent directories before writing the UTF-8 report file.
Fix parse_event so JSON payload fields are normalized correctly: string booleans like "false" should become False, and string retry counts should become integers.
Fix next_billing_date so monthly renewal keeps the same day-of-month when possible and clamps to the end of shorter months, including leap-year February.
Fix safe_join so it rejects path traversal and absolute paths instead of allowing callers to escape the provided root directory.
Fix compress_ranges so duplicated numbers do not cause a hang. The function should merge consecutive values and tolerate duplicates without entering an infinite loop.
Fix parse_csv_row so commas inside quoted CSV fields are preserved instead of splitting the field in the middle.
Fix should_retry so it retries transient statuses like 429 and 503 only while retry budget remains, and it never retries auth failures like 401.
Fix render_template so cache entries are invalidated when the template version changes instead of serving stale content by name only.
Fix build_archive_command so paths containing spaces are shell-quoted correctly and remain single arguments when parsed by a shell.
Fix is_recent so naive ISO8601 timestamps are interpreted as UTC instead of crashing when compared with timezone-aware UTC datetimes.
Fix slice_page so has_more and next_cursor are correct on the final full page; it should not advertise another page when the current page already reaches the end.

Fix compute_signature so semantically identical JSON payloads produce the same HMAC signature. The payload should be canonicalized before signing instead of depending on key insertion order or whitespace.
Fix build_idempotency_key so the same logical tag set produces a stable key regardless of input ordering or duplicates.
Fix accumulate_cost_micros so fractional USD costs are rounded up to whole micros instead of being truncated away.
Fix redact_authorization so Bearer tokens are redacted case-insensitively and only the secret value is replaced, preserving the scheme prefix.
Fix merge_chunks so it keeps the first non-null finish_reason seen in a stream instead of overwriting it with later null chunks.
